_publications._publicationTitle: Forward genetic screen for malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor formation identifies new genes and pathways driving tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: CIS overlap between two methods for defining CISs in grade 3 PNSTs and neurofibromas was 65% and 68%, respectively
details: CIS overlap between two methods for defining CISs in grade 3 PNSTs was 65%
